title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; chat, generate, embed with Ollama.

title: langchain-community/llms/ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat component.

title: llama-index-llms-ollama
summary: LlamaIndex LLM integration for Ollama; plug local models into RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; manage models & chat in browser.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community CLI wrapper that adds prompts, history, and model-switching sugar on top of ollama.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-like VS-Code extension via local server.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU & model auto-pull.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Rust+Yew WASM chat app that talks to Ollama over REST; no server needed.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama; generate, chat, pull, and embed with fluent API.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama REST API; chat, generate, and list models idiomatically.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams answers from any Ollama model into your server.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLMs via Ollama for summarization & Q&A on notes.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client for Ollama with async support and native Nim types.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package for Ollama; chat and generate with local models in mobile apps.

title: ollama-curl
summary: Lightweight Bash library wrapping curl to interact with Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision Ollama on AWS EC2 with GPU and model bootstrap.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama models into channels via slash commands.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration to use Ollama generators & chatters in NLP pipelines.
